templates.name: Sales Collection
templates.content: You can take a look at our sale collection here: https://www.untuckit.com/collections/sale

templates.name: Can I use your codes in store?
templates.content: Yes, codes can be used in-store as well!

templates.name: Unsubscribe from emails. (ESC after)
templates.content: Sure, can I have your email address please?

templates.name: Do you ship to PO boxes?
templates.content: Yes, we do ship to PO Boxes, however, please make sure to choose a USPS shipping method to ensure that your package is delivered to you in a timely manner. UPS doesn't ship to PO Boxes per their shipping policy.

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/UNTUCKit/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/UNTUCKit

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship
templates.content: The best way to discuss this is to email us directly at questions@untuckit.com. Our team is happy to chat!

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on domestic orders over $110. Maybe you can add something else to reach the minimum?

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at questions@untuckit.com. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: You can find us at a store near you here: https://www.untuckit.com/blogs/store-locations

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! You can learn more and apply for your discount here: https://www.untuckit.com/pages/idme

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: I can check if that's possible. What's the order number, email address and the change you'd like to make?

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: You can give us a call at +1 (888) 992-3102 or let me know if I can help via text, it may be faster.

templates.name: Where are your items made / manufactured?
templates.content: All our items are made in Vietnam, China, Peru, and Sri Lanka.

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://www.untuckit.com/pages/returns-exchanges

templates.name: Rewards / referral
templates.content: We have a referral program where you can give your friends 25% off their first order and get a 25% coupon for each successful referral. Check it out here - https://www.untuckit.com/pages/referral

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Our processing time takes 1-2 business days and we usually ship via UPS. Once shipped, it will take 3-7 business days for domestic orders.

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at questions@untuckit.com. Our team is happy to chat!

templates.name: Sizing
templates.content: Happy to help you find the right size! I'd recommend taking a look at our sizing guide to determine the best fit for you: https://www.untuckit.com/pages/find-your-fit If you're still unsure, just let me know!

templates.name: What if my exchange order costs more than my e-credit?
templates.content: You will need to enter your credit card information for the balance.

templates.name: What kinds of fabrics do you use?
templates.content: We use super high-end fabrics on all of our shirts, most of which are 120-2ply, and offer many varieties.

templates.name: When should I mail back the item(s) I want to exchange?
templates.content: Return your unwanted item(s) as soon as you can, using the return label provided. Please remember to include the original packing invoice! You have 30 days from the time that the order arrives at your door to declare your return and send the goods back.

templates.name: I know my size in your button downs. What size knit should I buy?
templates.content: If you wear a regular fit in our shirts, we would recommend trying the same size in the knits. If you wear a slim fit, we would recommend sizing down. You can also learn more about our fits here: https://www.untuckit.com/pages/find-your-fit

templates.name: How can I return a gift?
templates.content: Please visit returns.untuckit.com. Below the field where you are asked to enter your email address, click "Returning a Gift?" and follow the instructions to successfully process your return.

templates.name: How long should it take to process my exchange?
templates.content: All exchanges are shipped via UPS Ground from Kentucky. If you need to receive your exchange order faster, please process your return as a return for a refund, and place the exchange order via a credit card purchase on our website including an expedited shipping option. This order will be considered a new order.

templates.name: What time do overnight or 2-day shipments need to be ordered?
templates.content: All US orders must be placed before 1:30 pm ET to be processed the same day. All orders placed after 1:30 pm ET will ship the next business day. Please note all orders after 1:30 pm ET on Friday will ship on the following Monday, with the exception of holidays, which will ship Tuesday.

templates.name: What if my exchange order costs less than my e-credit?
templates.content: You will get a refund back to the original form of payment provided.

templates.name: When will I receive my refund?
templates.content: Please note that it can take between 3-5 business days to process your return at our warehouse. Once processed, it could take an additional 3-5 days for your bank to generate a refund back to your original form of payment.

templates.name: How do I return or exchange my order?
templates.content: Please go to our return/exchange page here: https://returns.untuckit.com/ and use your order number and email address to log in. This will prompt you to create a ticket where you can let us know which items you would like to return or exchange. We will send you a shipping label from there!

templates.name: Can I return final sale items?
templates.content: I'm afraid that items marked as 'final sale' cannot be exchanged or returned for a store credit or refund. Apologies for the inconvenience!

templates.name: Can I return or exchange my store purchase online?
templates.content:
We're only able to accept returns and exchanges for in-store purchases at the location in which the items were originally purchased. Please reference our store contact list to find the address, phone number, and hours for all of our store locations: https://www.untuckit.com/blogs/store-locations However, If you do not reside near the store location, the store will email a prepaid UPS label to you in order to be  printed out and used to mail the return to the store location. If you do not have an email account, they can mail the UPS label to your mailing address. 

I'm afraid we cannot accept store bought items to be returned to our distribution center in Shepherdsville, KY.

templates.name: Why was I offered an untuckit e-credit when I want a refund?
templates.content: You have the option to waive the refund back to the original form of payment and instead, take advantage of the UNTUCKit E-Credit offer. An UNTUCKit E-CREDit allows you to shop for something new right away on our site. The voucher will need to be used at checkout. Please be sure to ship the return using the prepaid return label.

templates.name: Can I return items from more than one order in the same box?
templates.content: Yes, you're able to return all of your items in the same box (let's save some trees!) Please pack your items along with their corresponding packing invoices. If you can't find your original invoice, please include the shipment or order number for each order you're returning. You can find your shipment and order numbers by signing in to your UNTUCKit.com account.

templates.name: Do you ship internationally?
templates.content: We don't offer international shipping at the moment.

templates.name: Size Chart: All - Clothes
templates.content: You can take a look at our size chart here: https://www.untuckit.com/pages/all-size-charts

Your code expires in 48 hours, please text us for suggestions or if you need assistance with your order.

templates.content: Thank you so much for reaching out! We do offer free shipping on orders over $110. That being said, we would LOVE for you to try the Original UNTUCKed shirt so here is a free shipping code SHIPV6XNRTD8 just for you! Your code expires in 48 hours, please text us for suggestions or if you need assistance with your order.

templates.name: Where can I use my gift card, can I use it in-store?
templates.content: Gift cards can be used at untuckit.com, by phone, or in any UNTUCKit store.

templates.name: Store inquiry
templates.content: What store are you interested in connecting with? I will have them reach out to you directly via text.
